name: @memberjunction/ai-bridge-livekit
description: MemberJunction: LiveKit Realtime Bridge driver — the MJ-native multi-party room. Unlike the other bridges (which connect OUT to a 3rd-party meeting platform), LiveKit is a SELF-HOSTED WebRTC SFU that MJ runs itself. Connects the realtime agent engine to a LiveKit room as a bot participant (audio/video/screen in+out, per-participant diarization, data-channel chat) via an injectable LiveKit room SDK seam, and contributes a Meeting Controls facilitator channel.
author: MemberJunction.com
